title: Sr ML & AI Engineer
company_focus: Location data and technology platform company
description:
What's the role? As a Senior ML & AI Engineer, you play a
key role in designing, building, and deploying machine
learning and AI solutions that operate at scale. You
contribute across the full lifecycle — from problem
definition and model development to deployment and
continuous improvement — while collaborating with
cross‑functional teams to deliver reliable, high‑quality
outcomes.Your work directly supports HERE’s mission to
deliver intelligent, data‑driven location services used by
customers worldwide. Key responsibilities include:

- Deploy ML models into production environments
- Build scalable ML infrastructure and APIs
- Implement MLOps practices including model monitoring,
  retraining, and versioning
- Optimize model performance, latency, and scalability
- Design, develop, and optimize machine learning models for
  real-world applications
- Implement supervised, unsupervised, and deep learning
  algorithms
- Build pipelines for data preprocessing, feature engineering,
  model training, and evaluation
- Work with large datasets to develop predictive and
  generative models

Who are you? You are a collaborative engineer with strong
problem‑solving skills and a passion for building practical
AI solutions. You bring experience translating business or
product needs into effective machine learning systems and
enjoy working in a diverse, global environment.

- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Machine
  Learning, AI, Data Science, or related field
- 4+ years experience in machine learning engineering or AI
  development
- Strong programming skills in Python and Advance Sql.
- Experience with ML frameworks such as:TensorFlow
  PyTorch,Scikit-learn.
- Experience with data processing and distributed computing
- Experience deploying models using Docker, Kubernetes or
  terroform.
- Experience working with AWS services.
- Solid understanding of: Machine learning algorithms, Deep
  learning, Model evaluation and optimization,Data
  structures and algorithms

- What Do We Offer?
  - A collaborative and inclusive work environment
  - Opportunities to work on meaningful, real‑world problems at
    global scale
  - Continuous learning and professional growth through
    challenging projects
  - Flexible working arrangements supporting work‑life balance
  - Competitive compensation and benefits aligned with local
    market practices

Who are we? HERE Technologies is a location data and
technology platform company. We empower our customers to
achieve better outcomes – from helping a city manage its
infrastructure or a business optimize its assets to guiding
drivers safely to their destinations.At HERE, we take it
upon ourselves to be the change we wish to see. We create
solutions that fuel innovation, provide opportunity, and
foster inclusion to improve people’s lives. If you are
inspired by an open world and driven to create positive
change, join us. Learn more about us on our
https://www.youtube.com/@HERETechnologies. Learn more about
us on our YouTube Channel.

About the team:You will be part of a global engineering team
focused on building scalable Machine Learning and AI
solutions that power HERE’s next‑generation location
platform. The team works closely with product, data, and
platform partners to translate complex problems into
impactful, production‑ready systems.
responsibilities: Design, develop, and optimize machine learning models for real-world applications
Deploy ML models into production environments
Build scalable ML infrastructure and APIs
Implement MLOps practices including model monitoring, retraining, and versioning
Optimize model performance, latency, and scalability
Build pipelines for data preprocessing, feature engineering, model training, and evaluation
Implement supervised, unsupervised, and deep learning algorithms
Work with large datasets to develop predictive and generative models
use_cases: Generative AI models for location-based applications
Scalable ML solutions for global location platform
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building, deploying, and
optimizing ML and AI models across the full lifecycle — from
model development to production deployment and MLOps. The
engineer works hands-on with ML frameworks, builds
pipelines, and deploys models, making this a clear ai-first
role.
